observations: Azure blob container permits anonymous downloads

output.hypothesis: Public storage exposure may enable secret or credential discovery
output.risk: credential exposure and cloud privilege escalation risk
next_checks: inspect artifacts for secret patterns without reproducing secrets
review RBAC assignments tied to deployment identities
remediation: set container access level to private

output.hypothesis: Overly permissive IAM may enable post-compromise privilege escalation
output.risk: large cloud blast radius if workload identity is abused
next_checks: map trust relationships and assume-role paths
identify sensitive APIs available to the role
remediation: monitor privileged API use and permission drift
